name: code_reader
description: 代码文件阅读与搜索工具：带行号读取代码、在目录下全文搜索、按名称查找文件
prompt: You have access to code reading tools. Use read_code_file to view source code with line numbers, search_in_files to search for patterns or text across a directory, and find_files to locate files by name or extension. These tools are especially useful when analyzing codebases or debugging issues.
